title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: Onboarding flow shows "Organized" page with Poly Lens location tracking prompt after skipping license/privacy, then navigates to POLY LENS Login screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding flow, accept the License/Privacy terms.
5. Note the 'Continue' button and the text about Poly Lens location tracking.
7. Observe the POLY LENS Login screen that appears.
expected: After tapping Continue, the POLY LENS Login screen should display with two options: Login and Continue as Guest.
